cnbc.title: UAE's shock OPEC exit: What it means for the oil cartel's future and for crude prices
cnbc.summary: The UAE wants to ramp up production without constraints from OPEC, which could prove bearish for prices at some point.

cnbc.title: Here's everything to expect when the Fed issues its latest interest rate decision Wednesday
cnbc.summary: In what could be Jerome Powell's final meeting as Fed chair, he and his fellow policymakers are likely to continue their cautious approach.

cnbc.title: Jamie Dimon warns of 'some kind of bond crisis' ahead as global debt risks build
cnbc.summary: Dimon, who runs JPMorgan Chase, the world's largest bank by market cap, said that today's growing mix of risks could combine in unpredictable ways.

cnbc.title: James Comey charged with threatening Trump's life in ‘8647’ seashell post
cnbc.summary: Trump had accused the former FBI Director Comey of "calling for the assassination of the president" by sharing the image of the numbers in an Instagram post.

cnbc.title: Starbucks raises full-year outlook as turnaround takes hold — despite higher gas prices
cnbc.summary: Starbucks' global same-store sales, which only includes cafes open at least a year, increased 6.2%, fueled by more visits to its locations.

cnbc.title: DHS shutdown: Congressional dysfunction imperils pay for TSA, Secret Service
cnbc.summary: The Department of Homeland Security has been shut down since February, as Congress continues to look for a compromise to fund the agency.

cnbc.title: FCC launches review of Disney broadcast licenses years ahead of schedule
cnbc.summary: The Federal Communications Commission has told Disney to file its broadcast license renewals early, citing concerns around its DEI policies.

cnbc.title: U.S. airlines are hiking fares — and travelers keep booking
cnbc.summary: Executives say travelers keep booking despite big jumps in airfare as they seek to cover the cost of fuel.

cnbc.title: U.S. oil hovers near $100 on report Trump dissatisfied with Iran's proposal to open Hormuz
cnbc.summary: Oil prices rose as investors parsed fresh signals from U.S.-Iran negotiations, with uncertainty over a potential de-escalation keeping markets on edge.

cnbc.title: Pharma bets a little-known form of cholesterol will underpin its next blockbuster heart drugs
cnbc.summary: Novartis, Amgen and Eli Lilly are betting that slashing levels of a particularly bad form of cholesterol could deliver the next blockbusters in cardiology.
